This item appears on
  • Employment Opportunities

ONLINE EMPLOYMENT APPLICATION

A copy of all Prerequisites must be included with the application. 

New Employees will be required to successfully complete the District Medical Examination, Drug Screen and Background Investigation.

The Foresthill Fire Protection District is an equal opportunity employer and does not discriminate in employment on the basis of race, color, religion, creed, sex, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, marital status, national origin, ancestry, age, disability, medical condition, military or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state, or local law.

Thank you, your submission has been received.
